prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated B18C Type R (B18C5) from the JDM Integra DC2, featuring a 11.1:1 compression ratio, 84mm bore x 89mm stroke, and a 10,400 RPM redline. Pair with a TODA Racing 87mm stroker crank, TODA billet connecting rods, and JE 87mm forged pistons to achieve 2.0L displacement and 240+ HP at the wheels with a TODA C spec camshaft (264° duration, 11.5mm lift) and individual throttle bodies (ITBs) from Jenvey Dynamics (45mm bore).

Forced induction via a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing, 56 trim compressor) on a custom manifold by Full-Race Motorsports, paired with a GReddy Type-S front-mount intercooler (600x200x76mm core) and a Tomei 80mm titanium wastegate. Fueling includes a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 injectors, and a Hondata K-Pro ECU with a custom basemap tuned by Church Automotive Testing (CAT) for 350 WHP on E85.

Chassis reinforcement with a Mugen EG6-specific 4-point roll cage (1.75" x .120" DOM tubing) and a Spoon Sports front strut tower bar. Suspension setup includes Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (22-way adjustable damping, 30-way adjustable rebound), Spoon Sports front and rear sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear), and Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings (full set). Braking system features Endless CC-R6 rotors (280mm front, 260mm rear) with 4-piston calipers from a JDM NSX and stainless steel braided lines from Goodridge.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (EG6-specific, with 3-piece overfenders, carbon fiber front bumper, and rear diffuser), paired with a custom carbon fiber hood from Seibon (vented, 50% weight reduction). Rear wing is a Voltex Type-3 (1990mm width, 3D carbon construction) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals.

Interior stripped and fitted with a Bride Zeta III reclinable bucket seat (fixed-back, FIA-approved) and a Takata Drift III 4-point harness. Steering wheel is a Mugen MF10 (350mm diameter, suede-wrapped) with a NRG quick-release hub. Gauges include a Defi Advance BF series (oil pressure, oil temp, boost, wideband AFR) mounted in a custom carbon fiber A-pillar pod by Auto Meter.

Exterior lighting upgraded to Hella Micro DE fog lights (55W H3 bulbs) and custom LED taillights by Jun Auto (clear lenses, sequential turn signals). Wheels are Work Meister S1 3P (15x9 +15 front, 15x10 +22 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (225/45/15 front, 245/40/15 rear). Paint is a custom 3-stage pearl (House of Kolor Shimrin 2 with Kandy Apple Red over a silver base) applied by a certified PPG refinisher.
